description: Coulson and Robbie have a quiet conversation about the deal Coulson made with the Rider, agreeing to keep its details secret for now. Robbie takes the Darkhold and uses his chain to open a portal, transporting himself and the book back to the dark world. The S.H.I.E.L.D. team reconvenes, acknowledging Talbot’s survival and the coming threat of arrest, then agrees to face it together.
location: Zephyr One (S.H.I.E.L.D. quinjet / mobile command plane)

transcript.line: You know, I think this is the first time we've all been together in a really long time.
